text: bought a inflatable kayak at 3am and honestly i might keep it
the return label printer is my worst enemy. jammed again
package says out for delivery since 6am. its 11pm. WHERE IS IT
impulse bought a 40lb bag of rice. im one person. why
had 14 items in my cart at 2am. closed the tab. opened it again at 2:07am
return shipping is $8.99 for a $12 item. guess i own this now
the tracking number hasnt updated in 5 days. im calling the fbi
3am me has zero financial boundaries. 3am me is dangerous
abandoned my cart and they sent me a 10% off email. the system works
bought 3 of the same shirt in different colors like a cartoon character
return window closed yesterday. i bought it 2 months ago and never opened it
refreshing the tracking page every 4 minutes like it changes anything
ordered a phone case and got a shower curtain. close enough i guess
my saved for later cart is worth more than my savings account
bought a pasta maker at 1am. i dont even like cooking
they want me to ship this return in the ORIGINAL packaging. its been a month bro
delivery said left at front door but theres nothing at my front door
just bought matching outfits for me and my cat. no shame
left a full cart for 3 days. the guilt emails are relentless
the item was $4.99 but shipping was $13.99. make it make sense
my package is in a city 20 min away but wont arrive for 6 more days somehow
2am purchases hit different. ordered a crossbow. a CROSSBOW
cart abandonment is self care actually
ordered from wish once. the sunglasses were for a doll apparently
return policy said free returns. the fine print said otherwise
tracking says delivered to mailbox. i dont have a mailbox
bought a label maker at 4am and labeled everything in my house by noon
17 items in cart. total is $340. closes app. opens app. still $340
the warehouse is 3 miles from my house and shipping takes 8 days
added to cart just to see the total and now im emotionally attached
return drop off location is 45 min away. guess this is mine forever
package tracking: departed facility, arrived facility, departed facility. its touring
bought noise canceling headphones at 3am to cancel out my bad decisions
saved for later is just a graveyard of things i wanted but couldnt justify
ordered 2 day shipping 9 days ago. interesting definition of 2
returning something on amazon is easy. returning something on any other site is war
my package went from ohio to california. i live in new york. routing genius
4am brain said yes to a life size cardboard cutout of nicolas cage
abandoned cart emails feel like an ex texting u still up?
bought the wrong size twice. apparently i dont know my own measurements
ups said they attempted delivery. i was home all day. no they didnt
late night shopping is my cardio at this point
my cart has items from 2024 in it still. theyre vintage now
free shipping over $35 so i added a $7 thing i dont need. economics
the return was approved 3 weeks ago. still no refund. cool
delivery photo shows my package in front of someone elses house. great
bought a waffle maker a panini press and a crepe pan at 2am. i eat cereal
put something in my cart, price went up $3 overnight. they know
ordered same day delivery at 11:58pm. bold move lets see
return label wont scan. post office lady sighing at me. i deserve this
tracking updated: your package is on the truck. that was 14 hours ago
impulse bought a star naming certificate. i own a star now i guess
the cart icon showing 23 items is a cry for help
wish the return process was as easy as the buying process
my mailman knows my shopping habits better than my therapist
bought workout equipment at midnight. its a coat rack now
estimated delivery: tuesday-friday. thats not an estimate thats a guess
one click buy is a weapon of mass destruction for my bank account
they charged me return shipping AND a restocking fee. highway robbery
ordered black got charcoal. these are not the same color
3am me and 3pm me have very different financial philosophies
cart total went from $40 to $180 and i genuinely dont know how
free returns they said. just print the label they said. printer broke
package has been in transit for 2 weeks. its on vacation apparently
bought a keyboard for a computer i dont own yet. planning ahead
abandoned cart so hard the website emailed me asking if im ok
the dopamine hit of add to cart vs the depression of checking out
usps tracking is just astrology for packages. means nothing
3am amazon order: a hammock, 50ft of rope, and a book on knots. im fine
item arrived broken. return process has 11 steps. im keeping the broken thing
bought matching bathrobes for the whole family including the dog
the way my heart drops when i see the credit card statement on the 1st
subscribe and save is just future me's problem
put it in the cart to remember it. now i have 47 memories
fedex driver yeets my package from the truck every single time
late night infomercial energy but on my phone in bed
return window is 14 days. i remembered on day 15. of course
package out for delivery is the most exciting status update in my life
bought a 3d printer at 4am. printed one thing. a boat. thats it
same item is $15 on one site and $45 on another. the internet is fake
adding stuff to cart as a coping mechanism should be in the dsm
return accepted but they want me to ship it to a different country lol no
tracking says in transit to next facility for the 9th time. theres a loop
the guilt of seeing 6 amazon boxes on my porch when my neighbor walks by
wishlisted it instead of carting it. growth
overnight shipping: arrives in 3-5 business days. words mean nothing
ordered a rug and it showed up the size of a placemat. read the dimensions ppl
my cart is a vision board at this point
bought a 12 pack of sriracha at 2am because what if they stop making it
return was so complicated i wrote a negative review instead. cathartic
doorbell cam caught the delivery guy dropping my fragile package from shoulder height
shopping cart across 5 different tabs. diversified portfolio
they sent me 2 by accident. do i say something. no i dont think i will
the package was supposed to arrive monday. its thursday. i am deceased
impulse bought a cheese making kit. i am not a cheese maker
cleared my cart. felt empty. added everything back. felt whole
waiting for the delivery truck like a dog waiting for its owner
the item i returned is back in stock at a lower price. the audacity
3am purchases are just surprise gifts from past you to future you
